name: omnilease-protocol
description: OmniLease: The Composable NFT Utility & Rental Protocol

scripts.deploy:sepolia: hardhat run scripts/deploy/01_deploy_core.js --network sepolia && hardhat run scripts/deploy/02_setup_modules.js --network sepolia
scripts.deploy:mainnet: hardhat run scripts/deploy/01_deploy_core.js --network mainnet && hardhat run scripts/deploy/02_setup_modules.js --network mainnet
